aws.label: Karpenter
aws.description: Just-in-time node provisioning based on pending pod requirements

gcp.label: Autopilot
gcp.description: Fully managed node auto-provisioning by GKE

azure.label: Cluster Autoscaler
azure.description: Automatic node pool scaling based on resource requests

hetzner.label: Cluster Autoscaler
hetzner.description: hcloud autoscaler adds/removes nodes based on pending pods

alibaba.label: Cluster Autoscaler
alibaba.description: ACK auto-scales node pools by pending pods

aws.label: CloudFront WAF
aws.description: Web Application Firewall for CloudFront distributions

gcp.label: Cloud Armor
gcp.description: DDoS protection and WAF for load balancers

azure.label: Azure WAF
azure.description: Web Application Firewall on Application Gateway

alibaba.label: Alibaba Cloud WAF
alibaba.description: Web Application Firewall (WAF 3.0) for the ingress domain

aws.label: ACM Certificate
aws.description: Free TLS certificate managed by AWS Certificate Manager

gcp.label: Google-Managed Certificate
gcp.description: Free TLS certificate managed by Google Cloud

alibaba.label: SSL Certificate
alibaba.description: Managed TLS certificate from Alibaba Cloud SSL Certificates Service

gcp.portabilityNote: Firestore uses a document-collection model. DynamoDB key schemas will be adapted to Firestore document IDs.

azure.portabilityNote: Cosmos DB partition keys cannot be changed after creation. Review the key strategy before provisioning.

alibaba.portabilityNote: Tablestore primary keys are fixed at table creation. Review the key strategy before provisioning.
